context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the flowchart-readme scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Uses Mermaid flowchart syntax
checklist.description: The answer contains a fenced mermaid block whose first meaningful line starts with flowchart or graph.

checklist.name: Captures the requested lifecycle
checklist.description: The diagram includes request, draft, validation, and response or publish stages.

checklist.name: Readable and maintainable
checklist.description: Node IDs and labels are stable, concise, and easy to edit.

checklist.name: States assumptions briefly
checklist.description: The response includes no more than one concise assumptions sentence outside the diagram.
